events.label: reasoning
events.text: The scenario describes rebar placement with insufficient cover (bars touching form/ground). This is a clear non-compliance with ACI 318 and ACI 117 which require minimum concrete cover over reinforcement. The work is rough-complete stage. This is a fail decision with high risk.
